title: chamaecrista nummulariifolia
intro: Chamaecrista nummulariifolia, also known as the button carpet clover, is a plant species within the legume family, native to tropical Africa and India. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant's leaves, roots, and seeds have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering health benefits like pain relief and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Chamaecrista nummulariifolia is often used as a tea or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new medicines.
